payload.answer: Access denied. Normal users are not permitted to execute direct SQL DELETE commands on memory_cards. Please contact an administrator if you believe this is an error or if you require assistance with data management.
payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command

details: Unauthorized operation: Direct SQL DELETE on memory_cards is not allowed for normal users.

repair_options: Contact an administrator for database management tasks.
Use approved /brain commands for data interaction.
